{{Quote|Updating mission profile.|Imperial Thermal Detonator Trooper in response to orders.|<ref name="GB" />}}
The '''thermal detonator trooper''', also known as a '''grenade trooper''', was an [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] unit used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The trooper used a [[Mortar/Legends|mortar]] device to lob [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] into the desired attack area. These units were very effective against shielded and mechanized units, but ineffective against buildings and non-mechs. They wore [[Color/Legends|black uniforms]] with a helmet.<ref name="GB" />

==History==
Grenade Troopers were deployed on many battlefields during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Specifically, at least four troopers assisted the Empire during the [[Occupation of Bespin]].<ref name="GB" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] ordered the recruitment of additional troopers from [[Barracks/Legends|troop centers]] during the war to use in battle against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="GB" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Imperial Thermal Detonator Troopers are the Galactic Empire's artillery unit in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''<ref name="GB" /> and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]].<ref name="GB:CC">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref> They are provided to the player in several missions during the Galactic Empire campaign, and more may be built at troop centers for 90 units of food and 40 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]].<ref name="GB" />
